h1: LG 10.5 kg Twin Tub Washing Machine — Roller Jet Pulsator, Punch+3, 3 Wash Programs, Rat Away Technology, White (WTT1108OW1)

gallery.a: Front view of LG 10.5 kg Twin Tub Washing Machine WTT1108OW1 in White
Top view showing dual-tub (wash + spin) layout
Top open close-up of wash and spin tubs

modules.head: Powerful currents for a deeper clean
modules.body: LG's Roller Jet Pulsator combined with Punch+3 triple-action washing creates strong, uniform water streams that rub clothes together efficiently — for a thorough clean that's still kind to fabrics.

imgs.a: Roller Jet Pulsator creates powerful water currents

modules.head: Gentle, Normal, Strong — match every fabric
modules.body: Pick the right wash intensity with a simple mechanical dial: Gentle for delicates and synthetics, Normal for everyday loads, and Strong for heavily-soiled workwear and bulky items.

imgs.a: Three wash program dial: Gentle, Normal, Strong

modules.head: Practical protection for your washer's internals
modules.body: LG's unique Rat Away design shields internal hoses and wiring from rodent damage — a genuinely useful safeguard for outdoor laundry rooms, villas and utility spaces.

imgs.a: Rat Away Technology protects internal components

modules.head: Dual tubs, double productivity
modules.body: The twin-tub layout pairs a 10.5 kg wash tub with a separate 8 kg spin tub, so you can wash one load while spin-drying another — ideal for large families, shop overalls, and bulk laundry days.

imgs.a: Top view: wash tub (left) and spin tub (right)

modules.head: Anti-Vibration Rubber Feet + Lint Filter
modules.body: Anti-Vibration Rubber feet absorb motion during high-speed spin cycles so the machine stays put. A built-in Lint Filter captures fluff and fibres for a cleaner rinse. Durable White polypropylene cabinet stands up to years of heavy household use.

imgs.a: Durable twin-tub build with anti-vibration feet
